protein_name: Acts probably as a receptor for selective autophagosomal degradation of ubiquitinated targets. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: macroautophagy; negative regulation of osteoblast differentiation; regulation of bone mineralization; regulation of stress-activated MAPK cascade
